subcodes.first_line: The tender saplings of the rose-garden of Divine unity who are learning the lessons of spiritual conduct are the object of providential grace and abide beneath the canopy of divine favour and bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نونهالان گلشن توحید که درس اخلاق میخوانند منظور نظر عنایتند و در ظلّ فضل و موهبت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @education of children; moral education, @high station of learning, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
